message:
test(messaging): comprehensive federation unit tests — 45 new tests covering all roles, validation, serialization, lifecycle

Bead 8w83i.11.3: Unit tests for federation.

- MorphismConstraints: validation (empty classes, zero expansion/fanout),
  admits() boundary checking
- Role configs: LeafConfig, GatewayConfig, ReplicationConfig, EdgeReplayConfig
  each tested for default validation, zero-value rejection
- TraceRetention: all 3 variants validation, zero artifact/duration rejection
- FederationBridge: empty capability scope, empty morphism set, missing
  capability for morphism, remote-only morphisms, both-side morphisms,
  edge replay ObserveEvidence requirement
- Bridge lifecycle: provisioning → active → degraded → closed, closed
  cannot reactivate/degrade, degraded can reactivate
- Serialization: JSON round-trip for all 4 role configs, tagged
  FederationRole, bridge states, all enum variants
- State ordering: Provisioning < Active < Degraded < Closed
- Default enum values verified
- Gateway amplification boundary acceptance
- Leaf egress morphism with full validation compliance

51 total tests (6 existing + 45 new), 0 clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
